location: Resting on the throne inside the Throne Room on the upper floor of the Fortified Manor, Leyndell, Royal Capital — the room mirrors the layout of the Roundtable Hold's Two Fingers chamber.

source.name: Throne in the Fortified Manor Throne Room

tactics: From the Fortified Manor, First Floor grace, work up to the second floor via the stable rooftops or interior stairs.
Head to the central throne room southwest of the map (the one echoing the Roundtable Hold's layout) — the sword sits directly on the throne, unguarded.
Must be collected before defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade — it becomes unreachable once Leyndell burns into the Ashen Capital.
lore: A concealed blade once entrusted to a Tarnished of the Round Table by the Two Fingers — its edge is nothing but a formless cipher that cuts with holy force no shield can turn aside.

builds.name: Pure Faith caster-sword
builds.why: B Faith scaling with zero physical scaling and 85 pure Holy damage make it a Faith build's answer to physical damage negation.
